zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：横盘偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前BTC价格围绕65600-65700窄幅震荡，整体动能偏弱，短线缺乏明确方向，市场进入整理阶段，多空博弈胶着短期偏弱  

MACD柱值为-102.74显示空头动能占优，价格跌破SMA20均线66043，短期均线压制明显，但指标未过度超卖信号偏弱  

上方阻力关注66000及66043均线区域，下方支撑位于65500附近，若跌破则可能测试65000整数关口，区间结构清晰观望为主  

操作上建议以区间交易为主，反弹接近阻力可轻仓做空，回踩支撑区域可短线低吸，严格控制止损避免震荡洗盘灵活止盈控制风险

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action around 65,694 shows an extremely tight consolidation phase, with intraday movement compressed between 65,706 and 65,649. This kind of narrow range typically reflects market indecision and liquidity equilibrium rather than directional conviction. Despite the lack of volatility, the broader short-term structure leans slightly bearish, as price remains positioned below the 20-period simple moving average, suggesting sellers still have marginal control over momentum.

The 20-period SMA at 66,043 continues to act as a dynamic resistance ceiling, reinforcing overhead pressure. MACD readings are deeply negative at -102.74, signaling sustained downside momentum even if price has temporarily stalled. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation is limited, but the divergence between price stability and bearish MACD suggests latent downward bias rather than genuine reversal strength at this stage.

Immediate resistance is clustered near 65,706, the recent intraday high, followed by stronger structural resistance at 66,043 where the SMA20 sits. On the downside, initial support is located at 65,649, the session low, which is currently being tested by price compression. A decisive break below this level could open the path toward 65,500 and potentially deeper liquidity zones if selling pressure accelerates.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range-bound strategies until a clear breakout occurs. Scalping long positions near 65,650 support may be viable, but requires tight risk control due to bearish momentum signals. Alternatively, bearish continuation setups become more attractive if price rejects the 66,000–66,043 zone. Breakout confirmation in either direction is essential before committing to swing positions.
